hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new type-checking methods isShort() and isByte() to the Content interface.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To extend the Content interface to support identification of short and byte numeric types, enabling finer-grained type checks.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Implemented the newly added isShort() and isByte() methods to check if the wrapped value is a Short or Byte instance.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide concrete implementations for the new type-checking methods in ObjectContent, enabling recognition of short and byte values.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added overrides for isShort() and isByte() methods; isShort() delegates to underlying value, isByte() returns false.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To extend OpenSearchJsonContent to support short type detection and explicitly indicate that byte type is not supported.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended numeric type handling to include short and byte types, returning corresponding ExprShortValue and ExprByteValue instances.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: class OpenSearchExprValueFactory, method creating ExprValue from Content
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support creation of expression values for short and byte numeric types, enhancing numeric type coverage.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed access modifier of getRootName() method from package-private to public.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To allow external access to the root name of the predicate, possibly for better error reporting or usage outside the class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import for BYTE type from ExprCoreType.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of BYTE type constant in the class, supporting byte type handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended switch case in tryConvertDocValue method to include BYTE type alongside INTEGER and SHORT for conversion to Long.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support conversion of byte typed expressions to Long, ensuring consistent handling of smaller integer types.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Improved error message in UnsupportedScriptException to include root name of the expression instead of the whole expression object.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: class CalciteScriptEngine, method returning Pair.of(referenceField, exprType)
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide clearer and more concise error messages when field name is empty, aiding debugging.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Initialized objectMap variable before try block in deserialize method to ensure it is accessible in catch block.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To allow more informative error handling by having access to objectMap in the catch block if deserialization fails.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Enhanced exception handling in deserialize method to differentiate between null objectMap and other errors, providing more specific error messages.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve error diagnostics by distinguishing failure causes during deserialization and reporting relevant context.
